_description: Question hook + (year) + iconic detail. The Fern/LEMMiNO classic. Currently validated on v1 Mary Celeste, v2 Dyatlov, v3 Tunguska.
example: What Did CROATOAN Mean? (1587) — The Lost Colony of Roanoke
style_notes: Question must be answerable in the video. Iconic detail must be the unforgettable phrase. Use the em-dash (—), never the hyphen (-).
